title: symbol per-package spec
description: Schema for per-package spec.toml files under src/wyolet/symbol/data/specs/<package>/spec.toml. See docs/spec-schema.md for prose docs.

name.description: Package name (PyPI name, or stdlib module name).

category.description: Category key — must match a key in [categories] of the global data/spec.toml.

type.description: Package role. lib = importable library; tool = CLI/dev tool; app = end-user app.

stdlib.description: True for Python stdlib modules. Stdlib specs are always loaded regardless of project deps.

import_name.description: Import name when it differs from the package name (e.g. Pillow → PIL, PyYAML → yaml).

runtime_only.description: True for packages used only at runtime (not imported in source — e.g. wsgi servers like gunicorn).

detect.description: Heuristics for detecting this package as active in a project.

deps.description: PyPI names that, if present in project deps, mark this package as active.

config_files.description: Config-file basenames that indicate this package is active (e.g. alembic.ini).

checker.description: AST-checker file filters applied when this package is active.

scanner.description: LOC-scanner file filters applied when this package is active.

patterns.description: Glob patterns of files that should never be flagged as orphans (e.g. fastapi/staticfiles.py).

severity.description: Default severity for module-level side effects from this package. Defaults to warning.

calls.description: Call names (bare identifiers like `include_router`, not `app.include_router(...)`) grouped by severity. Use `skip = [...]` to silence known-safe calls and `error = [...]` to escalate dangerous ones.

patterns.description: File basename or path globs (e.g. `handlers.py`, `tests/**`) grouped by severity. Used to demote/promote findings based on file role.

orphan.description: Legacy alias for [checkers.orphan]. Prefer [checkers.orphan] for new specs.

side_effects.description: Legacy alias for [checkers.side_effects]. Prefer [checkers.side_effects] for new specs.

module_level.description: Legacy: default severity for module-level side effects.
